name: dynamo-sglang
_comment_c_serving: 0 µs/seq — Dynamo orchestrator absorbs per-seq host work into the CUDA-graph launch. Same recalibration as dynamo-trt; the prior 1-2 µs default was over-counting at large B post-MLA-migration. The underlying SGLang runtime has Python-heavy paths but those fire once per microbatch under Dynamo, not per-seq.
_comment_kernel_launch: 12 µs — SGLang's per-kernel dispatch is heavier than TRT-LLM's because the SGLang-specific Python wrapping leaks through even under Dynamo orchestration.
